vectorContext:
Issue: Prediabetes / Insulin Resistance with mobility limitations - Mild - Metabolic. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Shellfish-based meals, Refined pastries), Exercises to avoid (Long sedentary periods between intense sessions)
Issue: Mild Chronic Kidney Disease - Mild-Moderate - Renal. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Very salty packaged snacks), Exercises to avoid (Extreme dehydration sessions, Unsupervised very high-volume training in heat)
Issue: Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome - Mild - Autonomic. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Shellfish-based meals), Exercises to avoid (Dehydration-based training)
